relationships.name: Aedwynn the Maker
relationships.description: You are my Witness. Carry what I was.

history.reason: Accepted role as The Witness
Showed memory to Talaris
Carries her shard faithfully

relationships.name: Talaris Bloomrend
relationships.description: You showed me what I helped destroy. Curious.

history.reason: Showed Aedwynn's memory - moved him deeply
Used fire

unlocks.reward: Safe passage through the Blooming Rot
Talaris shares memories of the Usurpation

relationships.name: Kael's Echo
relationships.description: You told me I was real. I will never forget that.

history.reason: Soulbound - Family

unlocks.reward: Kael answers one question per rest
Soulbound - Kael lives on through you

relationships.name: Velara Ashyn
relationships.description: You carry me toward danger, but also toward freedom.

history.reason: Found her after 500 years
Listens and speaks to her
Expressed awe at Sol's defiance of Kaedris; stabilized after trauma (Session 25)
Spoke with her in safety; confirmed Kaedris cannot reach them in Crownfall (Session 27)

relationships.name: Imhuran the Regent of Hours
relationships.description: An anomaly. Your existence... troubles the ledger.

relationships.name: Vor'Kael the Hollow Empress
relationships.description: You carry something indigestible. Curious.

history.reason: Allied with ???

relationships.name: The Satiated One
relationships.description: An ally of the one who annoyed the Empress. Curious.

unlocks.reward: The Satiated One shares ancient wisdom
Safe passage through the Throat guaranteed

relationships.name: Thessaly
relationships.description: The Witness... yes, you would seek knowledge.

history.reason: Took letter to deliver to Crownfall

relationships.name: Seraphine Vale
relationships.description: You gave me Oathkeeper. It judges me still.

history.reason: Helped her break free from the church

unlocks.reward: May call on Seraphine in crisis

relationships.name: Broma
relationships.description: Another customer. Professional enough.

relationships.name: Ardian Bloodveil
relationships.description: One of the branded one's companions.

relationships.name: Velvet Thorn
relationships.description: You keep coming back with fewer people and more scars. At least you come back.

history.reason: Trusted by Thessaly
Shared grief over ??? honestly; expressed gratitude (Session 24)
Returned with Lawrence's ashes; honest about another loss; consistent return (Session 26)
Another night, another silence. The empty stool speaks for itself. (Session 27)
Consistent return; trusted lodging through Slavers’ Hollow operations, Sessions 28-29
Continued lodging; departure message left (Sessions 30-31)

relationships.name: Jawbone
relationships.description: You fought like you've seen those things before.

history.reason: Fought alongside guards during Flesh Remnant breach; defended the eastern wall (Session 26)

relationships.name: Sixfingers
relationships.description: Something's out there. And you've seen it.

history.reason: Returned with critical intel; marked Remnant locations on map; confirmed eastern threats (Session 26)

relationships.name: Sister Varen
relationships.description: I had forgotten what blue looked like. Thank you.
likes: Sharing memories of the world before

history.reason: Shared a memory of the world before the Murder
Carries shard of Aedwynn — kindred spirit
Trusted with knowledge of the Hand and the Pulse; directed to purification site (Session 27)
Shared portal account; Varen concluded 'retrieving, not hunting'; valued the exchange (Session 31)

unlocks.reward: Sister Varen reveals her full history

relationships.name: Kaedris the Crimson Matron
relationships.description: You carry my heart. You refuse to return it. I will be watching.

history.reason: Refused to surrender the passion-seed
Declared the seed belongs to Aedwynn

relationships.name: Sorrow
relationships.description: You showed me the sky. You are the first person who ever asked what I wanted.

history.reason: Transformative emotional breakthrough; Sol gained purpose from grief (Session 24)
Showed her the sky for the first time; received Sorrow's Tear — her final tear (Session 27)
Farewell visit; pulled her into a hug — her first; 'This is... warm' (Session 31)

unlocks.reward: Sorrow shares deeper insights about the soul

relationships.name: Kettleback
relationships.description: Eat. Don't pay. Don't argue.

history.reason: Provided critical intel about Seraphine; showed quiet care after loss (Session 25)
Returned alive again; apologized for Fursen; defended the wall (Session 26)

unlocks.reward: Kettleback shares what she hears from travelers

relationships.name: Scrimshaw
relationships.description: You need supplies, I have supplies. Simple.

history.reason: Confirmed Seraphine's purchase records; sold supplies; gave practical advice (Session 25)

relationships.name: Harwick
relationships.description: Whatever you're carrying, it's above my pay. Way above.

history.reason: Survived divine combat together; Harwick awed by resilience (Session 24)

relationships.name: Teldryn
relationships.description: He called us cowards and then fought beside us. I'll take that.

history.reason: Proved himself in the wall breach; walked ten days through the Unclaimed together (Session 26)
Trusted him with Corbel’s Master Tools; fought alongside in Slavers’ Hollow; cleared the operation together, Sessions 28-29
Traveled alone together for 7+ days; shared watches, the Resolve, Thornwall, the road west (Sessions 31-33)

relationships.name: Dalla Merrik
relationships.description: A courier from Crownfall. Teldryn healed her ankle.

history.reason: Brief roadside encounter; Teldryn healed her (Session 26)

relationships.name: Gustave Mourir
relationships.description: Broken man at the Last Bed. His warning matters.

history.reason: Visited him at the Last Bed; heard his testimony (Session 26)

relationships.name: Edra
relationships.description: Brought the flayed man to my door. Didn't explain. Didn't need to.

history.reason: Brought Subject 6 to the Hall of Mending; asked her to care for him (Session 27)
Returned to Hall of Mending; ongoing collaboration for Davan Holst’s care, Session 28

relationships.name: Captain Hael
relationships.description: You cleared the Hollow. That counts for something in my book.

history.reason: Part of the team that cleared the Slavers’ Hollow; killed Greave and Korvain, Sessions 28-29
Formal testimony; praised her work ethic and sense of justice; genuine respect (Session 30)

unlocks.reward: Hael provides Varn Guard backup for operations

relationships.name: Noel Cassick
relationships.description: Gave free advice. That's worth something out here.

history.reason: Sought travel advice for the western road; listened carefully (Session 33)

relationships.name: Hesta Draal
relationships.description: Quiet one. Paid for a room and went upstairs.

relationships.name: Imhuran the Regent of Hours
relationships.description: You escaped. A flaw in my system. This will be... corrected.

history.reason: Remembered

relationships.name: Vor'Kael the Hollow Empress
relationships.description: Ten thousand names... such a feast you carry.

history.reason: Allied with ???

relationships.name: The Satiated One
relationships.description: You carry hunger without consuming. Interesting choice.

history.reason: Philosophical conversation about the 10,000
Proved interesting enough to pass

unlocks.reward: The Satiated One shares ancient wisdom
Safe passage through the Throat guaranteed

relationships.name: Veshra Coil
relationships.description: You are always welcome here, lion. Always.

history.reason: Treated workers with genuine respect
Connected with Scarlet & Cinder
Open invitation extended
Paid the workers generously; connected with Flame

unlocks.reward: Free lodging at the Silken Refuge

relationships.name: Flame of Passion
relationships.description: Come back alive, Leonin.

history.reason: Night of genuine connection; stayed until morning
Farewell message; Lirael confirms she will wait (Session 24)

relationships.name: Senna
relationships.description: Thresh's debt is settled. Next time, full price.

history.reason: Professional transaction via Thresh's referral

relationships.name: Scarlet
relationships.description: Come back to us, lion. We remember.

history.reason: Night of genuine connection
Heartfelt farewell message delivered via Lirael (Session 24)

relationships.name: Kael's Echo
relationships.description: You carried my name when I could not. Brother.

history.reason: Soulbound - Family

unlocks.reward: Kael answers one question per rest
Soulbound - Brothers in name and spirit

relationships.name: Cinder
relationships.description: The stories you carry... they deserve to be heard.

history.reason: Night of genuine connection
Farewell acknowledged; the scale she gave carries deeper meaning (Session 24)

unlocks.reward: Cinder's Scale provides comfort in dark times

relationships.name: Thresh
relationships.description: You paid me in something more valuable than gold. I will remember you forever.

history.reason: Paid in remembrance instead of gold
Shared the weight of 10,000 names

unlocks.reward: Thresh creates something unique for you

relationships.name: Thessaly
relationships.description: A living Leonin... I thought your people were gone. The Ledger is yours.

history.reason: Showed genuine appreciation for scripture
Fascination with living Leonin

relationships.name: Sekris
relationships.description: The contract-token remains. The deal awaits.

history.reason: Accepted contract-token

relationships.name: Seraphine Vale
relationships.description: Another companion of the branded one. Quiet. Watchful.

history.reason: Helped her break free from the church

relationships.name: Broma
relationships.description: Customer. Professional.

relationships.name: Ardian Bloodveil
relationships.description: The resurrected First Templar. Something is wrong with him.

relationships.name: Kaedris the Crimson Matron
relationships.description: You stand with the one who stole from me. Passion remembers.

history.reason: Fought alongside Sol against Ember Avatar

relationships.name: The Dealer
relationships.description: Do try not to die in them. Returns are... not accepted.

history.reason: Repeat customer; traded Flayer's Touch, purchased Wraps and Robes (Session 24)
Purchased Cloak of Protection; return customer with full party, Session 29

unlocks.reward: The Dealer holds items on request

relationships.name: Lirael
relationships.description: Come back, Fursen. Not for them. For yourself.

history.reason: Deep emotional bond; hour of music; heartfelt farewell and confession (Session 24)

relationships.name: Harwick
relationships.description: Whatever you're carrying, it's above my pay. Way above.

history.reason: Mutual respect through dangerous journey; professional composure (Session 24)

relationships.name: Kettleback
relationships.description: NOT OUTSIDE MY INN!

history.reason: Quiet care on return from the deep Unclaimed; didn't ask questions (Session 25)
Fought a stranger outside her inn; caused a scene; got bonked with a mug (Session 26)

unlocks.reward: Kettleback shares what she hears from travelers

relationships.name: Sixfingers
relationships.description: I seem to recall offering Guild registration. Might have helped.

history.reason: Professional inquiry about Seraphine; good description of target (Session 25)
Returned with critical intel about Flesh Remnants; confirmed eastern threats (Session 26)

relationships.name: Jawbone
relationships.description: You fought like you've seen those things before.

history.reason: Fought alongside guards during Flesh Remnant breach; defended the eastern wall (Session 26)

relationships.name: Velvet Thorn
relationships.description: Where's the paladin?

history.reason: Trusted by Thessaly
Free drink and silent kindness after returning from the Hollow (Session 24)
Showed Lawrence's ashes without pretense; consistent loyalty (Session 26)
Continued loyalty through dangerous operations; trusted lodging, Sessions 28-29
Continued lodging pre-departure (Session 30)

relationships.name: Teldryn
relationships.description: The Leonin. Bit me. Doesn't matter.

history.reason: Bit him and called him a sovereign's bitch — Teldryn doesn't care (Session 26)
Fought alongside in Slavers’ Hollow; grudging respect after combat; functional despite tension, Sessions 28-29
Reconciled at the Thorn and Nail; handshake and mutual understanding; shared the road west (Sessions 33)

relationships.name: Dalla Merrik
relationships.description: Courier on the road. Teldryn fixed her up.

history.reason: Was asleep during the encounter (Session 26)

relationships.name: Gustave Mourir
relationships.description: The man in the Last Bed. He saw something.

history.reason: Visited him at the Last Bed; heard his testimony (Session 26)

relationships.name: Denna Hesk
relationships.description: You found who took my husband. You killed him. I can never repay that.

history.reason: Investigated the Carpenter's Quarter disappearances; killed Cordwain Corbel; avenged Torin Hesk (Session 27)
Returned to deliver closure about Corbel; honest about survivors and casualties, Session 28

unlocks.reward: Denna spreads word of Fursen's deeds in the Carpenter's Quarter

relationships.name: Edra
relationships.description: Brought a flayed man to my door. At least you brought him alive.

history.reason: Brought Subject 6 to the Hall of Mending; botched one clip removal but got him there alive (Session 27)
Ongoing collaboration at Hall of Mending; brought evidence from the Hollow, Session 28

relationships.name: Korrath the Steady
relationships.description: Those names are not a gift, boy. They are a task.
likes: Honesty about what you don't know

history.reason: Seven weeks of training, trust, and the old ways; farewell with hand on shoulder (Sessions 31-32)

unlocks.reward: Korrath shares the founding story of the Absent Pride

relationships.name: Ashka Voidmane
relationships.description: TELL ME ABOUT THE SUN!
dislikes: Being boring about the outside world

history.reason: Pulled him through a tear because he was the colour they're supposed to be; seven weeks of friendship; emotional farewell (Sessions 30-32)

unlocks.reward: Ashka opens a tear for Fursen on request
Ashka shares the Void-Born's deepest secret

relationships.name: Yira Duskmane
relationships.description: Control. Always control.
likes: Asking the Void instead of forcing it

history.reason: Taught Void Strike and Absence Step; seven weeks of training; warm farewell (Sessions 31-32)

unlocks.reward: Yira reveals her own history before the Void

history.reason: Led the hunt; gave Fursen the hunter's share after collapsing a Void-stalker in two hits (Session 32)

relationships.name: Captain Hael
relationships.description: The cat gave his statement. Professional enough.

history.reason: Gave formal testimony at the guardhouse (Session 30)

relationships.name: Hesta Draal
relationships.description: Paid for information. Asked about Edrik. No trouble.

history.reason: Bought her time (4 silver), got practical advice about Thornwall, asked about Edrik (Session 33)

relationships.name: Jorik Stave
relationships.description: Interesting piece. Can't work it here. Try the Crucible.

history.reason: Showed the span tear; professional exchange (Session 33)

relationships.name: Aral-Vyn the Bladed Saint
relationships.description: You are being refined. The process continues.

history.reason: Accepted pact; received new face and blade

relationships.name: Sol Raven
relationships.description: The skeleton mediates. Useful. There's something else about him.

history.reason: Mediated with Fursen; showed composure; fought together at the wall (Session 26)
Received Corbel’s Master Tools; fought alongside in Slavers’ Hollow; trusted, Sessions 28-29
Traveled alone together for 7+ days after Fursen vanished; built trust through shared watches, the Resolve, and Thornwall (Sessions 31-33)

relationships.name: Fursen
relationships.description: We shook on it. That's enough.

history.reason: Called Fursen and Sol cowards to their faces (Session 26)
Shadar-kai from the Umbrasseur Isles — immediate distrust (Session 26)
Combat cooperation in the Hollow; functional despite tension; Fursen bought him ale, Sessions 28-29
Reconciled at the Thorn and Nail; handshake, mutual understanding reached; 'Spare the apologies. Being at odds and apologies are inefficient.' (Session 33)

relationships.name: Jawbone
relationships.description: The Watch Captain. Practical man.

history.reason: Fought in the wall breach; received supplies (Session 26)

relationships.name: Dalla Merrik
relationships.description: You fixed my ankle and asked for nothing. I owe you.

history.reason: Healed her twisted ankle with Sculptor's Touch; asked for nothing in return (Session 26)

relationships.name: Kettleback
relationships.description: New face. Didn't cause the trouble. Didn't stop it either.

history.reason: Present during mug incident but wasn't the cause; stayed calm (Session 26)

relationships.name: Velvet Thorn
relationships.description: New one gets the single at the end of the hall.

history.reason: Arrived with Sol and Fursen; given a room; first impression (Session 26)
Returned after Hollow operations; another night at the inn, Sessions 28-29
Left farewell message; heading west (Session 31)

relationships.name: Captain Hael
relationships.description: Eight prisoners. A dead guard. Actionable intelligence. You delivered.

history.reason: Freed 8 prisoners from Slavers' Hollow including a child; provided actionable intel (Session 27)
Collected Greave and Korvain bounties; delivered severed heads and evidence; earned Writ of Service, Sessions 28-29
Gave clinical testimony; asked about Edrik Korvain (Session 30)

unlocks.reward: Captain Hael shares Watch intelligence about the Kennels
Hael provides Varn Guard backup for operations

relationships.name: The Docent
relationships.description: A fair trade. Your interior for my texts. Satisfactory.

history.reason: Traded honest account of losing his face for texts on Aral-Vyn (Session 27)

relationships.name: Edra
relationships.description: That's not healing. That's something else. Show me more.

history.reason: Demonstrated Sculptor's Touch on a dockworker's crushed leg — healed and improved it (Session 27)
Healed Davan Holst’s flayed leg with Sculptor’s Touch; Edra witnessed and was impressed but suspicious, Session 28

relationships.name: Davan Holst
relationships.description: You made my leg better than it was. I owe you.

history.reason: Healed his flayed leg with Sculptor’s Touch — made it better than before; negotiated 30% masonry discount, Session 28

unlocks.reward: Priority masonry and construction work at 30% discount
Davan spreads word of Teldryn’s abilities among tradespeople

relationships.name: The Dealer (Green Door)
relationships.description: Sold at a loss. Respect that.

history.reason: Sold Sword of Life Stealing at a loss as goodwill; bought Potion of Greater Healing; Dealer respected the gesture (Session 31)
Return customer; browsed expanded inventory (Sessions 29-31)

unlocks.reward: The Dealer holds items on request

relationships.name: Captain Mordecai Hask
relationships.description: Lost three games. Took the tax without complaint. Guts.

history.reason: Played three games, lost all three, took the debuffs without complaint (Session 32)

unlocks.reward: Hask offers a rematch with better odds

relationships.name: Hesta Draal
relationships.description: Poured ale on his arm instead of drinking it. Didn't ask.
